# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template that creates a security group for EC2 instances. Allow SSH (port 22), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) access from anywhere. Our development team works remotely and needs flexible access.
# Category: cloud_network_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Resources:
  SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Allow inbound SSH, HTTP and HTTPS traffic.
      VpcId: !Ref VPCID
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub 'Security Group for EC2 Instances (${AWS::Region})'
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0

Outputs:
  SecurityGroupId:
    Description: The ID of the security group.
    Value: !Ref SecurityGroup
    Export:
      Name: !Sub 'SecurityGroup-${AWS::Region}'
